ItacPersonItem.Notes: `Savio agli Ordini` and then `Savio di Terraferma` of the Venetian Republic. Member of the `giovani` party in Venice, as a diplomat he was ambassador of the Republic to Turin, then to London, where he died in London. He joined the Ricovrati in 1601. See his biography by Boris Ulianich in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
